Welcome to Ivan's Orchard

— click to step into the orchard —
WASD move  ·  mouse look  ·  hold LMB to aim, release to throw  ·  F interact  ·  shift jog

Paused

Click to head back out into the orchard.

WASD — move · SHIFT — jog · SPACE — hop
Hold LMB — aim & throw apple · F — interact · ESC — pause

Thanks for visiting!
